discoveries.evidence_summary: Alnylam stated in a 2014 company press release that it acquired Merck's RNAi assets including Merck's wholly owned subsidiary Sirna Therapeutics, Inc. A later SEC Exhibit 21.1 lists Sirna Therapeutics, Inc. as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam U.S., Inc. as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Securities Corporation as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Austria GmbH as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Belgium BVBA as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Brasil Farmaceutica Ltda as a 99%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam (Bermuda) Ltd. as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Canada ULC as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam France SAS as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Europe AG as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Germany GmbH as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Italy Srl as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Netherlands BV as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Spain SL as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Sweden AB as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam Switzerland GmbH as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies ALNYPT Unipessoal Lda as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
SEC Exhibit 21.1 identifies Alnylam UK Limited as a 100%-owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
